info.name: LithoApp RBAC Medical Workflow
info.description: Postman collection generated from the LithoApp source code. It uses API Gateway at {{gatewayBaseUrl}}, OAuth2 Authorization Code + PKCE S256 via Keycloak, and role-specific Bearer token environment variables. No JWTs or passwords are hardcoded.

description.content: Use Postman Authorization Code with PKCE S256 against Keycloak. The frontend clientId is frontend-client. Configure Postman OAuth2 using authorizationUrl, tokenUrl, clientId, redirectUri, and scope from the environment. Log in separately as UROLOGUE, BIOLOGIST, and ADMIN, then save/copy each returned access token into urologueAccessToken, biologistAccessToken, and adminAccessToken. No static JWTs are included.
Confirms the realm authorization and token endpoints before using Postman OAuth2.

Open this folder Authorization tab, choose OAuth 2.0, Authorization Code, PKCE S256, clientId=frontend-client, callback={{redirectUri}}, scope={{scope}}. Log in with a Keycloak account that has realm role UROLOGUE, then put the returned access token in urologueAccessToken.
Repeat the OAuth2 login with an account that has realm role BIOLOGIST and save the returned access token in biologistAccessToken.
Repeat the OAuth2 login with an account that has realm role ADMIN and save the returned access token in adminAccessToken.
Gateway health is explicitly permitted without authentication.
Any non-actuator protected route should reject missing Bearer JWT.
No gateway Swagger route was found. Spring Security authenticates unknown routes first in many setups, yielding 401; if routing handles it first, 404 is also acceptable.
Gateway SecurityConfig restricts metrics to ADMIN.
UROLOGUE has a valid JWT but not ADMIN role.
Requires UROLOGUE. DI and DMI are generated with {{$timestamp}} and saved from the response.

  ],

  "anatomicalAnomalies": []
}

exec: if (json.id !== undefined && json.id !== null) pm.environment.set("patientId", json.id);
if (json.di !== undefined && json.di !== null) pm.environment.set("patientDI", json.di);
if (json.dmi !== undefined && json.dmi !== null) pm.environment.set("patientDMI", json.dmi);

item.name: Delete patient as ADMIN if no linked episodes -> 204 or 409

description.content: Delete exists and is ADMIN-only. Use deleteCandidatePatientId for a disposable patient; the main workflow patient will usually return 409 once episodes exist.

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": "{{patientId}}",
  "openedAt": "2026-04-29",
  "title": "Postman stone episode",
  "notes": "Created from RBAC workflow collection",
  "recurrence": false
}

exec: if (json.id !== undefined && json.id !== null) pm.environment.set("episodeId", json.id);

item.name: Create METABOLIC analysis request as UROLOGUE

exec: if (json.id !== undefined && json.id !== null) pm.environment.set("metabolicAnalysisId", json.id);

item.name: Create STONE analysis request as UROLOGUE

exec: if (json.id !== undefined && json.id !== null) pm.environment.set("stoneAnalysisId", json.id);

item.name: Read metabolic analysis request by ID

description.content: BIOLOGIST can search analysis requests by patient identity through patient-service.

item.name: Negative - create analysis request as BIOLOGIST -> 403

description.content: No explicit start-analysis endpoint was found. First PDF upload or stone result update automatically transitions CREATED to IN_PROGRESS.

item.name: Upload valid BLOOD_TEST PDF as BIOLOGIST

description.content: Multipart field name must be file. Select a real PDF in Postman if {{testPdfPath}} is not resolved.

item.name: Upload valid MORNING_URINE PDF as BIOLOGIST
Upload valid H24_URINE PDF as BIOLOGIST
Complete METABOLIC analysis after at least one active PDF

description.content: If this is run after completion, the immutable-request guard may return 400 before file validation. For pure validation, run it before completion on a fresh metabolic request.

MetabolicDocumentType enum values found: BLOOD_TEST, MORNING_URINE, H24_URINE. Backend service allows METABOLIC completion after at least one active PDF, although one controller comment still says three.

exec: if (json.id !== undefined && json.id !== null) pm.environment.set("drainageId", json.id);

description.content: Drainage enum values found: DrainageType JJ, URETERAL, NEPHROSTOMY; DrainageSide LEFT, RIGHT, BILATERAL; DrainageStatus ACTIVE, REMOVED; JJType STANDARD_6F, LARGE_7F, BIODEGRADABLE, METALLIC.
